title.en: If he encounters the Void Beast of the Immortal...

content.en:
"Immortal Void Beast!"

Ye Tian also received a message from the other Eight Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm, and immediately felt tricky.

If he encounters the Void Beast of the Immortal Realm, he will definitely die.

Although he only came to copy the body this time, once he fell, those gains were lost.

"This replica body can't be dispatched, let the clone move, so even if the clone falls, the loss will not be big!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

His duplicate body hides and no longer acts, while the clone begins to look for resources, and once it finds a certain resource, it returns to the copy body, leaving the resources behind, and the clone continues to act.

As time passed, some of the Eight Extremes Realm still chose to leave, after all, they didn't dare to face a void beast comparable to the Immortal Realm, once they encountered it, they couldn't escape.

They weren't sure they could get more benefits, so they didn't want to lose the treasure they had.

For example, the Void Golden Pulp Wood, the value of such a 14 treasure is too high, and they don't want to lose it.

Therefore, even if they are doppelgangers, they are not willing to take risks.

In this way, more and more of the Eight Extremes Realm left the Abyssless Land, and even some Eternal Realms left the Abyssless Land.

There are a few clones in the Eternal Realm, for example, for the general half-step Eternal Realm, the Primordial Tree Heart can help them condense the clone, but the Primordial Tree Heart has no effect on the Eternal Realm.

Even if it is the half-step Eternal Realm of some Eternal Clones, once they break through to the Eternal Realm, it will be difficult for the clones to maintain, and they will not work at all.

Unless such a clone has been staying in his own territory and can maintain it, once he leaves his own territory and enters the Void Zone or other space-time territory, the clone will collapse.

And in one's own territory, maintaining a doppelganger is no different from a condensed avatar and a consciousness clone.

There are really too few lords who truly possess the Eternal Realm clone.

Therefore, in the case of danger to life, these eternal realms did not dare to take risks, so they chose to leave.

At the same time, news about the Abyssal Land began to spread in the major space-time territories, and even some Immortal Realm Lords learned of the news.

But.

These Immortal Realm Lords were not interested, obviously they didn't value the treasures of the Abyssal Land, but they still sent some of the Immortal Realm powerhouses under their command to the Abyss Land.

For the Immortal Realm, some things in the Abyss Land still have some value, and besides, I haven't entered the Abyss Land for countless years, and I'm afraid that there are a lot of good things accumulated there, which is enough to take a risk.

Sub 㐧

There are almost no good things left on the periphery of the Abyssal Land, and it has been scraped by many Eight Extremes Realm and Eternal Realm.

Ye Tian hadn't harvested for a long time, so he was ready to enter the depths of the Abyssless Land. Luan." The Void Beast of the Immortal Realm is deep in the Abyssal Land, and the other Eight Extremes Realm, and even the Eternal Realm Lord, probably don't dare to enter, but I dare to enter, it's a big deal that the clone falls, and I continue to condense one body out. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It's a pity that the realm of the Void Beast is comparable to the Eternal Realm, and he can't copy the body of the Void Beast, otherwise he can copy the body of the Void Beast and blend into the depths of the Abyss.

Wow!

Ye Tian's clone shuttled quickly and went to the depths of the Abyssal Land.

At the beginning, Ye Tian had not encountered the Void Beast of the Immortal Realm, so there was no major danger.

Moreover, in the depths of the Abyssal Land, there was no ordinary Void Beast, and he flew for a long time, but he did not encounter the shadow of the Void Beast, which was very abnormal in the periphery of the Abyssal Land.

"It is estimated that there are Void Beasts comparable to the Immortal Realm in the depths of the Abyss Land, and they are the territory of such powerful Void Beasts, so ordinary Void Beasts dare not approach it. Ye Tian guessed.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian felt a sense of attraction, an incomparably long-lost attraction, as if his entire soul was rejoicing.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian became excited.

This is the copying talent reminding him that there are treasures that can help the evolution of the copying talent.

For a long time, he thought that the copying talent had evolved to the extreme, but now he found that the copying talent could also evolve.

"Now that my copy body is comparable to the Immortal Ancestor in terms of level, if I continue to evolve, wouldn't I be able to surpass the Immortal Ancestor?"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although he still didn't know what the treasure that could attract the evolution of the copy talent was, he had to grab it at all costs.

Not to mention that there are Void Beasts comparable to the Immortal Realm here, even if there is a Void Beast comparable to the Immortal Realm, he has to break through, otherwise he will not be reconciled.

Immediately, Ye Tian followed the traction of the treasure and quickly shuttled over.

However, before he could reach the location of the treasure, a humanoid void beast appeared.

Rumble!

The opponent punched in, and the endless void shattered.

Ye Tian used an eternal technique to try to resist this punch.

However, the power of this punch was too terrifying, and those eternal techniques he used were shattered one after another, and the innate eternal rules were directly annihilated.

Then, he was knocked out with a punch, and his body was cracked.

But in an instant, he recovered.

In terms of the degree of life preservation, he was much stronger than the True Yang Saint Ancestor, and even stronger than the life preservation ability of some Immortal Realm Lords.

Although he is far from being an opponent of the Immortal Realm, he will not be killed by a few moves. 120

This Void Beast, which was comparable to the Immortal Realm, immediately became angry when he saw that Ye Tian had not been injured.

Its body became incomparably huge, and it slammed into Ye Tian with a punch.

Ye Tian wanted to get rid of this void beast, but his speed was not as fast as the other party, and his attack power was far inferior to the other party.

He had little power to resist.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian's injuries became more and more serious.

In the end, Ye Tian's body was completely annihilated by the other party, and even his will was shattered.

Somewhere in the Abyss.

Ye Tian's copy body sighed: "The clone was killed, and sure enough, he still couldn't escape from the hands of the Immortal Realm Void Beast." "

Next, he made a duplicate of the clone and tried to get the clone to go there again.

As a result, he still encountered the Void Beast and fell there again.

Falling twice in a row, Ye Tian pondered for a while.

"The Abyssal Land should be completely exposed soon, and even the lords of the Immortal Realm and even the Immortal Realm have come, I must follow them and blend into the depths of the Abyssal Land, otherwise there will be no way to get past that Void Beast and obtain the treasure I need. "

So, Ye Tian waited silently.

Finally this day.

A lord of the Immortal Realm descended on the Abyssal Land. _
